creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
r202756 updated references to /var/run/utmp, and other utx references, but did not update the document date on them. I noticed this when viewing w(1) and seeing a date of 1993, which long predates the utmpx changes.

Fix: Mirrored at http://people.freebsd.org/~bdrewery/patch-update-Dd-utmpx.txt
